fields.label: Organization
fields.helpText: Your Azure DevOps organization name (from dev.azure.com/{organization})

fields.label: Personal Access Token
fields.helpText: Generate at dev.azure.com/{org}/_usersSettings/tokens with required scopes

healthcheck_config.description: Validates PAT via Azure DevOps projects endpoint

metadata.summary: Azure DevOps for repositories, work items, pipelines, and CI/CD.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Go to dev.azure.com and sign in
2. Click User Settings (gear icon) -> Personal Access Tokens
3. Click 'New Token', set scopes (e.g. Code, Work Items, Build)
4. Copy the generated token
5. Enter your organization name and paste the token
